# `!copy`

**Category:** files

Copy a file (or recursively a directory tree) from the control machine to the target. Idempotent via SHA-512 content comparison.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `src` | string | yes | Local source path (a directory when recursive: true; otherwise resolved through files/ lookup). |
| `dest` | path | yes | Remote destination path. |
| `recursive` | bool | no | Recursively copy an entire local directory tree to dest. |
| `attributes` | map | no | File attributes applied to copied files: owner, group, mode. |

## Examples

```yaml
- !copy
  src: app.conf
  dest: /etc/app/app.conf
  attributes:
    mode: '0o600'
```
